Both diaphragms and costophrenic angles appear normal; pleural effusion is present. Bony structures are intact. Anchors are partially imaged at the right glenoid.
ground_truth.impression: Resolving b/l upper lobe pneumonia. Consider clinical correlation and follow-up imaging if symptoms persist.
